_comment: PRYZM 2 — S19 large-project fixture (D2 deliverable). 5,000 walls × 20 levels distributed by PRYZM 1 telemetry-derived length buckets. Used by `apps/bench/src/benches/load-large.bench.ts` to gate cold-load performance once S23 tier-streaming lands. Generated deterministically by `tools/generate-large-fixture.mjs`. NOTE: each wall id uses the ULID-shaped wall_<base32-26> form mandated by the protocol Id brand — but the seeds are fixed so regeneration is byte-stable.
